text: Seafarers with designated security duties are responsible for:

options.text: Knowledge of methods of physical structures of baggage

explanation: Seafarers assigned Designated Security Duties (DSD), as per STCW and ISPS Code, receive training in critical security functions. This includes understanding search techniques, methods for inspecting baggage and cargo, and identifying suspicious items or concealed compartments, directly related to the physical integrity of the vessel.
